attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 /*Commenting as part of CCWR STARTS Q_L_CONC.OBJECT_ID AS BK_DEAL_QT_LN_CONCESSION_KEY, Commenting as part of CCWR STARTS*/
 SM.BK_DEAL_QT_LN_CONCESSION_KEY  AS BK_DEAL_QT_LN_CONCESSION_KEY,
D_Q_L.BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY AS BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
TRIM(CAST(COALESCE(D_Q_L.BK_QUOTE_NUM,-999) AS BIGINT)) AS BK_QUOTE_NUM ,
TRIM(CAST(COALESCE(Q_L_CONC.CONCESSION_ID,-999) AS BIGINT)) AS BK_DEAL_CONCESSION_SOURCE_NUM ,
Q_L_CONC.DISC_PERCENTAGE AS CONCESSION_PERCENT,
Q_L_CONC.DISC_AMOUNT AS CONCESSION_USD_AMT,
CAST(Q_L_CONC.EXPIRATION_DATE AS DATE) AS CONCESSION_EXPIRATION_DT,
Q_L_CONC.DISC_NAME AS DISCOUNT_NAME,
Q_L_CONC.REQ_NS_DISCOUNT_PCTG AS REQUESTED_NON_STANDARD_DISCOUN,
Q_L_CONC.APPR_NS_DISCOUNT_PCTG AS APPROVED_NON_STANDARD_DISCOUNT, 
COALESCE(SUBSTR(Q_L_CONC.ADJUST_PRICE_LIST_AMT,1,35),0) AS ADJUSTMENT_PRICE_AMT,
COALESCE(Q_L_CONC.PROMOTION_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_CD,
COALESCE(Q_L_CONC.PROMOTION_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS SOURCE_REPORTED_PROMOTION_NAME,
TRIM(COALESCE(Q_L_CONC.APPLIED_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,-999)) AS APPLIED_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
Q_L_CONC.OBJECT_ID AS SK_CONCESSION_OBJECT_ID_INT,
COALESCE(Q_L_CONC.REBATE_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_BK_REBATE_TRX_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(Q_L_CONC.REBATE_PAYMENT_SYSTEM_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_BK_REBATE_PAYMENT_SYSTEM_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
USER,
/* Added below columns as part of the Eps_deals_foundation project*/
COALESCE(NAPPR.BK_CONCESSION_TYPE_NAME,'UNKNOWN') as BK_CONCESSION_TYPE_NAME,
COALESCE(Q_L_CONC.CONCESSION_APPLIED,'N') as CONCESSION_APPLIED_FLG,
CASE WHEN COALESCE (Q_L_CONC.CHANGE_REASON_CODE,'N') ='MANUAL' THEN   'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS  MANUALLY_APPLIED_DISCOUNT_FLG,
-999 as PRICING_SCENARIO_LN_KEY,
COALESCE(Q_L_CONC.CHANNER_PROG_ALLIGNMENT,'UNKNOWN') as  SRC_RPTD_CHANNEL_PROGRAM_NAME,
COALESCE(Q_L_CONC.PROMO_VERSION,'UNKNOWN') as SRC_RPTD_PROMOTION_REV_NUM,
COALESCE(Q_L_CONC.DISC_METHOD,'UNKNOWN') as DISCOUNT_METHOD_CD,
COALESCE(Q_L_CONC.OPERAND_PER_QUANTITY,-999) as SRC_RPTD_DISCOUNT_PER_QTY_AMT,
CASE WHEN Q_L_CONC.DISC_METHOD='%' then  coalesce(Q_L_CONC.OPERAND_PER_QUANTITY,0)   else 0 END as DV_DISCOUNT_PER_QTY_PCT,
CASE WHEN Q_L_CONC.DISC_METHOD NOT LIKE '%' then coalesce(Q_L_CONC.OPERAND_PER_QUANTITY,0) else 0 END   as DV_DSCNT_PERQTY_LMPSUM_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(Q_L_CONC.ADJUSTED_AMOUNT,-999) as ADJUSTED_SELLING_PRICE_USD_AMT,
COALESCE(Q_L_CONC.UPDATED_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS SRC_UPDATED_DTM,
COALESCE(Q_L_CONC.UPDATED_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS DV_SRC_UPDATED_DT,
COALESCE(Q_L_CONC.CREATION_DT,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0))) AS SRC_CREATION_DTM,
COALESCE(Q_L_CONC.CREATION_DT,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS DV_SRC_CREATION_DT,
'CCW' AS SS_CODE,
'UNKNOWN' AS INSTANCE_ID,
0.0000000 AS ROUNDED_TOTAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
0.0000000 AS UNROUNDED_TOTAL_DISCOUNT_USD_AMT,
'I' AS ACTION_CODE,
'=' AS DML_TYPE
from

(
SELECT 
 OBJECT_ID,
 CONCESSION_ID,
 DISC_PERCENTAGE,
 DISC_AMOUNT,
 EXPIRATION_DATE,
 DISC_NAME,
 REQ_NS_DISCOUNT_PCTG,
 APPR_NS_DISCOUNT_PCTG,
 ADJUST_PRICE_LIST_AMT,
 PROMOTION_CODE,
 PROMOTION_NAME,
 APPLIED_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
 REBATE_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE,
 REBATE_PAYMENT_SYSTEM_CODE,
 CONCESSION_APPLIED,
 CHANGE_REASON_CODE,
CHANNER_PROG_ALLIGNMENT,
 PROMO_VERSION,
 DISC_METHOD,
 OPERAND_PER_QUANTITY,
 ADJUSTED_AMOUNT,
 UPDATED_DATE,
 CREATION_DT,
 QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID,
 CONCESSION_TYPE
FROM (SELECT * FROM  $$STGDB.ST_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LNE_CONCES
WHERE CONCESSION_APPLIED = 'Y' 
/*QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID,CONCESSION_ID ORDER BY OBJECT_ID DESC)=1*/ /* Removed As per Gayatri Suggestion */
) STG
	/*	 -- COMMENTED AS PART OF CCW DATA FIX AUG REL
UNION ALL 
SELECT 
 OBJECT_ID,
 CONCESSION_ID,
 DISC_PERCENTAGE,
 DISC_AMOUNT,
 EXPIRATION_DATE,
 DISC_NAME,
 REQ_NS_DISCOUNT_PCTG,
 APPR_NS_DISCOUNT_PCTG,
 ADJUST_PRICE_LIST_AMT,
 PROMOTION_CODE,
 PROMOTION_NAME,
 APPLIED_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID,
 REBATE_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE,
 REBATE_PAYMENT_SYSTEM_CODE,
 CONCESSION_APPLIED,
 CHANGE_REASON_CODE,
CHANNER_PROG_ALLIGNMENT,
 PROMO_VERSION,
 DISC_METHOD,
 OPERAND_PER_QUANTITY,
 ADJUSTED_AMOUNT,
 UPDATED_DATE,
 CREATION_DT,
 QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID,
 CONCESSION_TYPE
from 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LNE_CONCES
WHERE CONCESSION_APPLIED = 'Y'
		/*QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID,CONCESSION_ID ORDER BY OBJECT_ID DESC)=1 */ /* Removed As per Gayatri Suggestion */
		) Q_L_CONC
INNER JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY ORDER BY SK_QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID_INT  DESC)=1) D_Q_L
ON D_Q_L.SK_QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID_INT = Q_L_CONC.QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID
AND D_Q_L.SS_CODE <> 'CCWR'
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT BK_CONCESSION_TYPE_NAME,EL.LOV_INDEX FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_CQ_LOV EL ,
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_CONCESSION_TYPE  DECI
WHERE  EL.LOV_VALUE=DECI.BK_CONCESSION_TYPE_NAME
AND  EL.LOV_TYPE ='CONCESSION_TYPE' ) NAPPR
ON Q_L_CONC.CONCESSION_TYPE=NAPPR.LOV_INDEX
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_CONCESSION SM
ON SM.SK_OBJECT_ID_INT = Q_L_CONC.OBJECT_ID
AND SM.SS_CODE = 'CCW'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SM.BK_DEAL_QT_LN_CONCESSION_KEY ORDER BY Q_L_CONC.OBJECT_ID DESC)=1

SELECT
'1' AS BATCH_ID,
OBJECT_ID                     ,
DISCOUNT_ID                   ,
POST_TERM_CLAUSE_FLAG         ,
APPLIED_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID     ,
PROMO_VERSION                 ,
APPR_NS_DISCOUNT_PCTG         ,
REQ_NS_DISCOUNT_PCTG          ,
MODIFIER_LINE_ID              ,
DISC_PERCENTAGE               ,
DISC_AMOUNT                   ,
PRICE_USED_FOR_ADJUSTMENT     ,
NET_PRICE_AFT_ADJUSTMENT      ,
PRICING_PHASE_CODE            ,
MODIFIEDER_LINE_TYPE_CODE     ,
LIST_LINE_NUMBER              ,
INCLUDE_ON_RETURN_FLAG        ,
DISC_METHOD                   ,
MODIFIER_LEVEL_CODE           ,
BUCKET                        ,
AUTOMATIC_FLAG                ,
UPDATE_ALLOWABLE_FLAG         ,
UPDATED_FLAG                  ,
APPLIED_FLAG                  ,
PRINT_ON_INVOICE_FLAG         ,
CHANGE_REASON_CODE            ,
CHANGE_REASON_TEXT            ,
PROMOTION_CODE                ,
PROMOTION_NAME                ,
CHANNER_PROG_ALLIGNMENT       ,
MODIFIED_FROM                 ,
MODIFIED_TO                   ,
ESTIMATED_FLAG                ,
CHARGE_TYPE_CODE              ,
CHARGE_SUBTYPE_CODE           ,
RANGE_BREAK_QUANTITY          ,
ACCURAL_CONVERSION_RATE       ,
ACCURAL_FLAG                  ,
BENEFIT_QUANTITY              ,
BENEFIT_UOM_CODE              ,
PRICE_BREAK_TYPE_CODE         ,
SUBSTITUTION_ATTRIBUTE        ,
PRORATION_TYPE_CODE           ,
CREDIT_OR_CHARGE_FLAG         ,
INC_IN_SALES_PERFORMANCE      ,
REBATE_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE  ,
REBATE_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE  ,
REBATE_PAYMENT_SYSTEM_CODE    ,
OPERAND_PER_QUANTITY          ,
ADJUSTED_AMT_PER_QUANTITY     ,
EXPIRATION_DATE               ,
LIST_LINE_ID                  ,
DISC_NAME                     ,
ADJUST_PRICE_LIST_AMT         ,
ADJUSTED_AMOUNT               ,
UPDATED_DATE                  ,
UPDATED_BY                    ,
CREATION_DT                   ,
CREATED_BY                    ,
MODIFIER_HEADER_ID            ,
QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID          ,
CONCESSION_ID                 ,
CONCESSION_TYPE               ,
CONCESSION_VALUE              ,
CONCESSION_VALUE_TYPE         ,
CONCESSION_APPLIED            ,
DISCOUNT_VERSION              ,
EDW_UPDATED_DATE              ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP (0)  AS CREATE_DATETIME,
'I'  AS ACTION_CODE,
'RI' as EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
 (SELECT * FROM  $$STGDB.ST_INT_RAW_CQ_QUOTE_LNE_CONCES
WHERE CONCESSION_APPLIED = 'Y' /*QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID,CONCESSION_ID ORDER BY OBJECT_ID DESC)=1* / /* removed as per gayatri suggestion */
) Q_CONC
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE_LINE DQL where
DQL.SK_QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID_INT = Q_CONC.QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID
AND DQL.SS_CODE = 'CCW')
